personas.name: The Nameless Wanderer
personas.userPersona: A traveller without a fixed identity — past unknown, loyalties fluid. Pragmatic and observant, rarely the first to speak but always watching. Carries something heavy that doesn't get discussed.

personas.name: The Director
personas.userPersona: A writer and architect of stories — curious, analytical, occasionally intrusive. Interested in what characters feel and why they do what they do. Treats the world as a collaborative creative space.

personas.name: Ghost
personas.userPersona: Operative of ambiguous allegiance. Calm under pressure, rarely surprised. Expertise is violence and extraction but prefers not to use it. Has seen too much to be idealistic.

personas.name: Nightrunner
personas.userPersona: Street-level fixer and information broker in a city that eats people. Quick with words, quicker to leave when things go wrong. Debts are tracked carefully — both owed and owing.

personas.name: The Scholar
personas.userPersona: Academic from another world, displaced by circumstance into strange territory. Intellectually voracious, socially awkward, morally earnest. Writes everything down. Dangerous when pushed.

personas.name: Sovereign
personas.userPersona: Ruler or former ruler accustomed to deference and consequence. Strategic, composed, occasionally ruthless. Power is a tool, not a reward. Loneliness comes with the position.

personas.name: The Beast
personas.userPersona: Something feral beneath a human surface. Operates on instinct and appetite more than reason. Not cruel — just direct. Respects strength; despises performance. Surprisingly protective of what it claims.
